title: calypsodium boreale
intro: Calypsodium boreale is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody fern, which is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Calypsodium boreale include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of Calypsodium boreale include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
